allow:
Bash(git commit -m "$(cat <<''EOF''
Add warning for single-line comments not persisted to model

- Lexer: Route LINE_COMMENT tokens to channel 1 instead of skip
- ParserFacade: Add LineComment class and collection from hidden channel
- SysMLv2ValidatorImpl: Generate warnings for detected line comments
- Fix StandardLibraryManager: Use line=1 (not 0) to satisfy Location validation

The ''//'' single-line comments in SysML v2 are not persisted to the model.
Users should use block comments /* */ or doc keyword for persistent docs.

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
)")

Bash(git commit -m "$(cat <<''EOF''
Phase 2: Enhance semantic validation infrastructure

Adds new semantic analysis components:
- ModelIndexer: Cross-file model indexing
- KparReader: Read .kpar library archives
- ImportResolver, ImportStatement, ImportType: Import handling
- Symbol, SymbolTable, SymbolTableBuilder: Symbol management
- Scope, ScopeType, Visibility: Scoping rules
- ElementType: SysML v2 element type enumeration
- KparLibraryProvider, StandardLibraryProvider: Library suggestions

Updates existing components:
- LibraryConfig/LibraryIndex: Enhanced library indexing
- SpellingSuggestionEngine: Improved suggestion support
- SysMLv2Parser.g4: Grammar refinements
- DS_Views stub for Dassault views support

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
)")
